name: BEYOND MEAT, INC.
business: Beyond Meat is a leading plant-based meat company offering a portfolio of revolutionary plant-based meats and other innovative plant-based food and beverage products. The company sells a range of plant-based meat products across three core platforms of beef, pork and poultry. As of December 2025, products were available across mainstream grocery, mass merchandiser, club store, natural retailer, and food-away-from-home channels including restaurants, foodservice outlets, schools, and a direct-to-consumer channel.

exposures.sentence: Beyond Meat is a leading plant-based meat company offering a portfolio of revolutionary plant-based meats and other innovative plant-based food and beverage products.
the occurrence of a cybersecurity incident or other technology disruptions or failure to comply with the laws and regulations relating to privacy and the protection of individual data
technological changes that might impact our products and/or business, including implementation of artificial intelligence technologies

catalysts.event: Launch of Beyond Test Kitchen DTC platform
catalysts.sentence: we launched in the fourth quarter of 2025

catalysts.event: Launch of Beyond Immerse protein drink
catalysts.sentence: In early 2026, we introduced our Beyond Immerse protein drink, an innovative combination of plant protein, fiber, antioxidants and electrolytes, launched exclusively through our Beyond Test Kitchen DTC platform.

catalysts.event: New sales agreement with Roquette for pea protein supply
catalysts.sentence: Subsequent to the year ended December 31, 2025, we entered into a new sales agreement with an initial two-year term expiring on December 31, 2027.
